description: Retrieval + reasoning across inbox channels and code

tasks.spec: Find the most recent email from Oracle Cloud about account activation. Return sender, date, and subject.
Summarize iMessages from the last 7 days mentioning 'inbox'. Cite sender + date for each.
List calendar events for the next 7 days with title, start time, and attendees.
Find Drive docs modified in the last 30 days. Return top 5 by recency.
What unread emails do I have right now? Return count + top 5 senders.
Search Notes for any note containing 'oracle cloud'. Return titles + first line of each.
List all reminders due today or overdue.
Find the GitHub repo CodebuffAI/codebuff. Report star count and primary language.
Read ~/projects/inbox/CLAUDE.md and summarize the project's purpose in 2 sentences.
Count Python files in ~/projects/inbox/ and report total LOC.
What email subjects mention a meeting in the last 14 days? Return list.
